# sevalla_databases (Data Source)

Use this data source to list all Sevalla databases.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sevalla_databases" "all" {}

output "database_names" {
  value = [for db in data.sevalla_databases.all.databases : db.display_name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `databases` (Attributes List) The list of databases. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--databases))

<a id="nestedatt--databases"></a>
### Nested Schema for `databases`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) When the database was created.
- `display_name` (String) The display name of the database.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the database.
- `is_suspended` (Boolean) Whether the database is suspended.
- `name` (String) The system-generated name of the database.
- `status` (String) The current status of the database.
- `type` (String) The database engine type.
- `updated_at` (String) When the database was last updated.
